{{Infobox character
| name = Handmaiden
| aliases = Nakothi’s Handmaiden
| appears_in = The Elder Empire: Sea, The Elder Empire: Shadow
| titles = Handmaiden of Nakothi, Elder, servant of Nakothi
| abilities = manipulate earth
| affiliations = Children of the Dead Mother
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

''See also: [[Handmaiden Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Handmaiden, also known as [[Nakothi]]’s Handmaiden, is a highly intelligent and vicious servant of the [[Great Elder]] [[Nakothi]]. Described in classical [[Imperial]] history as nightmare-like tapestries of flesh, these creatures possess a cruel intellect and have historically functioned as overseers or managers for [[Nakothi]]'s harvests, selecting specific human parts to be used in the creation of other beings. Physically, they are massive and terrifying; one instance describes a Handmaiden standing taller than the [[island]]'s highest trees, moving by rolling forward on pale tentacles covered in human-like hands. Their presence is so potent that it can warp the surrounding environment and cause madness in those who look upon them. In combat, [[Handmaidens]] are formidable foes capable of using trees as projectiles and directing armies of [[Nakothi's Children]]. While they are much more dangerous than lesser [[Elderspawn]], they can be defeated if an opponent uses a specialized weapon—such as an [[Awakened blade]]—to turn the target's own power against them. Such a strike can cause the Handmaiden to effectively destroy itself by absorbing its own [[essence]]. They act as agents of destruction for [[Nakothi]], often appearing when the [[Great Elder]] intends to reset a situation or eliminate perceived threats.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|A Handmaiden of [[Nakothi]] was summoned, manifesting as a hideous bundle of malice and insanity. This massive creature stands head and shoulders above the [[island]]'s tallest trees and moves by rolling on swarming tentacles. Her physical form consists of a mottled white, blue, and purple torso that is skeletally thin, topped by a head composed of mouths, eyes, waving stalks, and bone cages housing pulsing organs. While her whistle mimics the laughter of the [[Dead Mother]], she remains a target for cannon fire from [[The Testament]] as she utilizes her bony hands and tentacles.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Handmaiden]]'s torso is skeletally thin and mottled white, blue, and purple.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Handmaiden]]'s head is a chaos of eyes, mouths, waving stalks, and cages of bone containing pulsing organs.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Handmaiden]]'s whistle sounds similar to the [[Dead Mother]]’s laughter.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|A [[Handmaiden]] of [[Nakothi]] was summoned.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c25">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Handmaiden]] stands head and shoulders over the tallest trees on the [[island]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Handmaiden]] is a hideous creature that rolls on tentacles.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Nakothi]]’s [[Handmaiden]] is described as a bundle of malice and insanity.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Nakothi]]’s [[Handmaiden]] has bony hands and swarming tentacles.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c27">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Handmaiden]] is a target of cannon fire from [[The Testament]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c27" />}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Handmaiden is an [[Elder]] creature standing at least sixty or seventy feet tall, possessing a neck sixty feet in height and a bed of tentacles. This entity, which can cause [[Syphren]] to fall silent, is housed within a chest and directs the [[Children of the Dead Mother]]. Its physical form consists of a vast wall of pale, desiccated skin for a torso and bony, double-jointed arms. The creature's face is composed of a mass grave, a disemboweled corpse, a nest of writhing worms, and a plague-infested heart. Additionally, the Handmaiden demonstrates the ability to manipulate earth by pulling a dome away from an [[arena]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Handmaiden]] is a presence that causes [[Syphren]] to go silent.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c21">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Nakothi]]’s [[Handmaiden]] directs the [[Children of the Dead Mother]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c23">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Handmaiden]] can manipulate earth by pulling a dome of earth away from an [[arena]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c25">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Handmaiden]] is located in a chest.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Handmaiden]] is an [[Elder]] that stands at least sixty or seventy feet tall.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Handmaiden]] has bony, double-jointed arms.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Handmaiden]] is an [[Elder]] creature with a neck sixty feet high and a bed of tentacles.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Handmaiden]]'s torso is a vast wall of pale and desiccated skin.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Handmaiden]]'s face contains a nest of writhing worms, a disemboweled corpse, a mass grave, and a plague-infested heart.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c25" />}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Nakothi]]’s [[Handmaiden]] is a servant of [[Nakothi]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c12">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Nakothi]]’s [[Handmaiden]] almost killed [[Calder]] and [[Jerri]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Shera]] destroyed a [[Handmaiden]] and drew its [[essence]] inside her.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c12" />}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Handmaiden]] attacked.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Handmaiden]] attacked the [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“One of Nakothi’s Handmaidens. And it was your wife that did the summoning, though you knew that already, didn’t you?<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c25" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
